description.p: Tablio is a free, lightweight, native desktop application for managing databases. Connect to PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, CockroachDB, TiDB, and Cassandra/ScyllaDB through a single unified interface.

ul.li: Browse schemas, tables, views, and functions
SQL query editor with autocompletion and syntax highlighting
Inline data editing with change tracking

description.p: Add multi-row selection with Ctrl+Click, Shift+Click, and Ctrl+A support for bulk deletion. Fix per-database connection pooling for PostgreSQL and CockroachDB when connecting without a default database. Preserve row selection across auto-refresh using primary-key-based tracking.
Make database name optional for server-based connections, matching pgAdmin and other tools. Connect to a server first, then browse and select databases from the sidebar.

Add Microsoft SQL Server support with dedicated driver and versioned CI tests. Add SSL/TLS certificate validation with configurable trust settings across all database drivers. Code quality improvements and regression tests.
